A '''qworlth skaal''', also known as '''dread weapon''', was a biologically engineered worm-like organism that extended from the bow of a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] or [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]]. The creature could penetrate the surface of an enemy [[Starship/Legends|ship]] or [[Space station/Legends|space station]] and suck out all beings aboard. Alternatively, this dread weapon could be used to puncture a [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] surface, as on [[Helska IV]] when the [[Da'Gara's worldship|first Yuuzhan Vong worldship]] landed.
